role: Central HTTP API client and pure registry/formatting helper module for the canvas interface.
capabilities: HTTP error normalization via `jr` (returns `{error}` for non-2xx)
Graph/canvas state API (graph, types, run, set, move, addNode, connect, del)
Model registry queries (models, chatModelsDetailed, fit, modelLoad, modelConfig)
Node config schema helpers (resolveOptions, configSchemaToFields, coerceConfigValue)
Build-intent lifecycle (propose, resolve, approveReach, apply, intentAt, buildIntent)
Address-keyed reads/writes (pin, annotations, presentationPref, setPresentationPref, upTranslate, addressHelp, addressHistory, selfChangesAt, staleAt, refVersions)
Inbox/decision/review surface (inbox, coa, deferOffer, reviveOffer, surfaceOutput, react, reviewStart/Current/Next/Status, walkthroughStart, resolveStep)
Chat and conversation API (chat, chatStream, chatHistory, act, newConversation, listConversations, loadConversation)
Mode and RHM config (setMode, rhmConfig, setRhmConfig, MODES constant)
Voice circuit (voice, stt, tts, personas, voiceServices, voiceSwitch, voiceStream, finishedThought, voiceLog, voiceEngineKnobs)
Cognition engine facade (cogModelsForRole, cogInputs, cogFieldTypes, cogListRuns, cogFindRuns, cogRunRole, cogCreateRole, cogCreateSkill, cogCreateContext)
substance_why: The file implements 70+ typed fetch wrappers, a custom JSON-or-error normalizer, streaming chat parsing, and several pure UI-formatting helpers, all with extensive behavioral comments.
interactions_present: No DOM/user-event wiring here — only HTTP call functions and streaming callbacks (`chatStream` `onPart`/`onDone`, `voiceStream` returns a raw `Response`)
interactions_missing: No `AbortController`/cancellation for long streams or pending requests
No request deduplication, retry, or client-side caching
`upTranslate` has no FE consumer (comment notes identified_gaps)
`MODES` array is hardcoded despite the registry-is-truth claim for descriptions
No centralized surfacing of network failures (`jr` only normalizes HTTP non-2xx, not `fetch` rejections)
performance_risks: Every response is `any`, removing compile-time guards on large payload shapes
No cancellation can leave concurrent streams/readers running
`chatStream` buffers and parses every line in memory with no backpressure control
Registry endpoints (capabilities, models, etc.) are fetched fresh with no client cache
Synchronous `JSON.stringify` runs on the main thread for every request
`voiceStream` hands back a raw `Response`; callers may hold streams open
reuse_why: It encodes the canonical backend surface and several reusable pure helpers, but it is one flat `any`-typed module that mixes transport, streaming, domain-specific calls, and UI formatting.
decomposition_hints: Split transport layer (`fetch`, `jr`, headers, `AbortController`) from domain API modules
Split graph/canvas calls from chat/voice/conversation calls
Split build/wire/approval calls from inbox/review/walkthrough calls
Split cognition-engine calls into their own module
Move pure helpers (config schema, `relTime`, build-intent formatters) into a shared formatting/utils module
Keep streaming methods (`chatStream`, `voiceStream`) in a dedicated streams module or with their domain
